title: Arjun's Happy Animal Friends
synopsis: Little Arjun discovers different animals and the happy sounds they make, learning about joy and friendship through gentle encounters with a puppy, kitten, duckling, and bunny in his backyard.

pages.text: Arjun sees a happy puppy. Woof woof!

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler boy named Arjun with warm brown skin and dark curly hair sits on soft green grass, reaching toward a golden retriever puppy. The puppy has a big smile and wagging tail. Pastel yellow sunshine filters through the background with soft blue sky.
illustration.alt: Arjun playing with a happy golden puppy in a sunny yard

pages.text: The puppy is so happy! Woof woof woof!

illustration.description: Close-up of the golden puppy's face with bright, sparkly eyes and pink tongue hanging out happily. Arjun's small hands are gently petting the puppy's soft fur. Warm peach and yellow tones create a joyful, cozy feeling.
illustration.alt: Happy puppy being petted by Arjun with a joyful expression

pages.text: Arjun sees a happy kitten. Meow meow!

illustration.description: Arjun sits cross-legged on a soft lavender blanket, holding a fluffy orange tabby kitten. The kitten has bright green eyes and is purring contentedly. Gentle purple and pink flowers bloom in the simple background.
illustration.alt: Arjun cuddling with an orange kitten on a purple blanket

pages.text: The kitten is so happy! Meow meow meow!

illustration.description: The orange kitten nuzzles against Arjun's cheek while he giggles with eyes closed in pure joy. Both faces are close together showing their happiness. Soft coral and cream colors surround them in a dreamy, warm atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Kitten nuzzling Arjun's face as both show pure happiness

pages.text: Arjun sees a happy duckling. Quack quack!

illustration.description: Arjun kneels by a small pond with a bright yellow duckling paddling nearby. The duckling has an orange beak and creates gentle ripples in the pale blue water. Soft mint green reeds and cattails frame the peaceful scene.
illustration.alt: Arjun watching a yellow duckling swim in a quiet pond

pages.text: The duckling is so happy! Quack quack quack!

illustration.description: The yellow duckling flaps its tiny wings excitedly while standing in shallow water, creating small splashes. Arjun claps his hands in delight, both sharing the moment of joy. Aqua and sunshine yellow colors dominate the cheerful scene.
illustration.alt: Duckling flapping wings happily while Arjun claps with joy

pages.text: Arjun sees a happy bunny. Hop hop!

illustration.description: A fluffy white bunny with pink ears sits in a patch of soft clover while Arjun lies on his tummy nearby, both at eye level. The bunny's nose twitches adorably. Gentle sage green and cream tones create a peaceful meadow setting.
illustration.alt: Arjun lying in grass watching a white bunny in clover

pages.text: The bunny is so happy! Hop hop hop!

illustration.description: The white bunny bounces playfully around Arjun who sits laughing with arms outstretched. Motion lines show the bunny's happy hopping. Soft pink cherry blossom petals float gently in the warm, rosy background.
illustration.alt: Happy bunny hopping around laughing Arjun with cherry blossoms

pages.text: Arjun is happy too! All the animals are happy!

illustration.description: All the animals - puppy, kitten, duckling, and bunny - surround smiling Arjun as he sits in the center with arms wide open. Everyone looks joyful and content together. Rainbow pastel colors blend softly in the background creating a magical, loving atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Arjun surrounded by all his happy animal friends in a colorful group

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the puppy make?
What does the bunny do?
questions.explanation: The happy bunny goes 'Hop hop hop!'

questions.question: How do all the animals feel?
questions.explanation: All the animals are happy, just like Arjun!

pages.text: Arjun sees a happy ___. Woof woof!
The kitten is so ___! Meow meow meow!
